summary: Comprehensive testing of Phase A (Enhanced Patient Profiles) and Phase C (Live Queue Dashboard) features. All 17 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend E2E tests passed including patient registration with extended fields, phone lookup, PID display, check-in with priority, queue dashboard, and queue status transitions.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement recommended
Some older patients show '-' for PID (expected - they were created before PID feature was added)

passed_tests: Backend: Admin login success
Backend: POST /api/patients with all extended fields - PID auto-generated in TAH-xxxx format
Backend: Duplicate phone prevention - returns 400 with error message
Backend: GET /api/patients/search-phone - returns matching patients
Backend: Phone search with short query works
Backend: POST /api/patients/checkin with normal priority - queue_status=waiting
Backend: POST /api/patients/checkin with elderly priority
Backend: POST /api/patients/checkin with emergency priority
Backend: GET /api/queue - returns queue items with correct structure
Backend: Queue has priority sorting (emergency first)
Backend: PUT /api/queue/{id}/status?status=in_consultation
Backend: PUT /api/queue/{id}/status?status=completed
Backend: Invalid status rejected with 400
Backend: PUT /api/queue/{id}/priority?priority=elderly
Backend: PUT /api/queue/{id}/priority?priority=emergency
Backend: Invalid priority rejected with 400
Backend: GET /api/patients/{id} returns all extended fields
Frontend: Login as admin works
Frontend: Patients page loads with PID column
Frontend: New Patient dialog opens with phone lookup
Frontend: Phone lookup returns matching patients (9 results for '98765')
Frontend: All form sections present - Basic Info, Demographics, Ayurveda Profile, Contact & Emergency, Medical & Referral

Frontend: All form fields present - name, phone, email, age, gender, dob, blood_group, marital_status, occupation, prakriti, lifestyle, address, emergency_contact_name, emergency_contact_phone, referral_source
Frontend: Check-in dialog has Priority dropdown with Normal/Elderly/Emergency options
Frontend: Live Queue Dashboard loads with 3 columns (Waiting, In Consultation, Completed)
Frontend: Queue summary cards display correct counts
Frontend: Queue cards show PID, patient name, priority badge, patient type
Frontend: Priority dropdown on queue cards works
Frontend: Start button moves patient to In Consultation
Frontend: Complete button moves patient to Completed
Frontend: Refresh button present
Frontend: Patient Details page shows PID in header (TAH-0001)
Frontend: Patient Info tab shows all new fields - PID, DOB, Blood Group, Marital Status, Occupation, Prakriti, Lifestyle, Referral Source, Emergency Contact
critical_code_review_comments: DialogContent components missing aria-describedby for accessibility - add DialogDescription or aria-describedby prop (minor, non-blocking)
seed_data_creation: Test patients created during backend testing with TEST_ prefix. Suresh Kumar (TAH-0001) was pre-existing test patient.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase A and Phase C features fully functional. PID auto-generation working (TAH-xxxx format). Phone lookup working. All extended patient fields (DOB, blood group, occupation, marital status, emergency contact, lifestyle, referral source) working. Prakriti dropdown with all 7 options (Vata, Pitta, Kapha, Vata-Pitta, Pitta-Kapha, Vata-Kapha, Tridosha) working. Check-in with priority (Normal/Elderly/Emergency) working. Live Queue Dashboard with 3 columns working. Queue status transitions (waiting -> in_consultation -> completed) working. Priority update on queue cards working. Auto-refresh every 15s configured.

details.auto_pid: PID auto-generated in TAH-xxxx format (e.g., TAH-0001, TAH-0002)
details.phone_lookup: Search by phone (4+ digits) returns matching patients with View Profile option
details.extended_fields: All fields working - DOB, blood group, occupation, marital status, emergency contact (name + phone), lifestyle, referral source
details.prakriti_dropdown: 7 options available - Vata, Pitta, Kapha, Vata-Pitta, Pitta-Kapha, Vata-Kapha, Tridosha
details.duplicate_phone_prevention: Returns 400 error with message 'Patient with phone xxx already exists (PID: TAH-xxxx)'

details.three_columns: Waiting, In Consultation, Completed columns with counts
details.priority_flagging: Normal (gray), Elderly (amber), Emergency (red) badges on cards
details.queue_status_transitions: Start button moves to In Consultation, Complete button moves to Completed
details.priority_update: Dropdown on queue cards allows changing priority
details.priority_sorting: Emergency patients appear first, then Elderly, then Normal
